name: The Mother Meme Tree
description: The tree all memes grow from. A 1-of-1 living Meme Tree: 100% of its mint price became permanent WATER backing locked in the Water vault forever. Every harvest, half its yield grows the tree's backing and half buys Meme for Trees, claimable by whoever owns it. The backing is permanent and can never be withdrawn - this is an art purchase with a living yield feature, not a deposit. Rewards are yield-funded meme token drops; their value varies with the market and nothing is guaranteed.
